narrative.headline: What 2017 Kia Sorento owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine problems dominate owner complaints, with reports of sudden, complete power loss while driving at speed — in some cases linked to fires or crashes. Exterior lighting failures and electrical system malfunctions involving multiple simultaneous warning lights also appear frequently. Steering complaints describe a drifting sensation combined with sluggish, sticky response when correcting course.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report sudden, complete loss of engine power while traveling at highway or city speeds, leaving the driver without control of the vehicle. · 17 fire · 2 crash · 3 injured

issues.title: Exterior Lighting
issues.blurb: Headlights operating in automatic mode have been reported to shut off entirely for several seconds while the vehicle is in motion at night, then resume without driver input. · 1 crash

issues.sample: WHILE DRIVING THE CAR ON ANY ROAD (CITY OR HIGHWAY) IT WANTS TO DRIFT TO THE SIDE AND WHEN YOU GO TO CORRECT THE STEERING IT FEELS STICKY, FOR LACK OF BETTER WORDS, AND THERE IS A DELAY IN THE RESPONSE. SO I END UP OVER CORRECTING, AND I'M ALL OVER THE ROAD. THIS CAR IS SO UNSAFE
issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: Owners describe the vehicle drifting to one side during normal driving, with the steering feeling sticky and slow to respond when the driver attempts to correct course.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Multiple warning lights — including those for cruise control, ABS, and stability control — have been reported illuminating simultaneously at very low mileage, on more than one occasion in the same vehicle. · 4 fire
